Localization.Description: An administrator tried to log in to or logged out of a Dr.Web management server

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Administrator {subject.account.name} failed to log in to the Dr.Web management server on host {src.host}
Administrator {subject.account.name} logged in to the Dr.Web management server on host {src.host}
Administrator {subject.account.name} logged out of the Dr.Web management server on host {src.host}
